description: North Star knowledge seed packs — pre-validated knowledge items for common domains. Two collections: developer_core (9 packs) and cross_domain (20 packs).

packs.name: architecture
packs.description: Software architecture principles, patterns, and trade-offs

packs.name: design_patterns
packs.description: GoF patterns, enterprise integration patterns, and architectural patterns

packs.name: testing
packs.description: Testing strategies, methodologies, and tooling concepts

packs.name: documentation
packs.description: Code and system documentation best practices

packs.name: security
packs.description: Application security, OWASP, authentication, and secure coding

packs.name: deployment
packs.description: CI/CD, containerisation, orchestration, and release strategies

packs.name: observability
packs.description: Logging, metrics, tracing, alerting, and SLOs

packs.name: data_modeling
packs.description: Database design, schema patterns, indexing, and migrations

packs.name: performance
packs.description: Caching, query optimisation, async patterns, and scalability

packs.name: human_ai_collaboration
packs.description: Human-AI teaming patterns, oversight, and collaboration frameworks

packs.name: cybersecurity
packs.description: Threat modeling, security operations, and defence-in-depth

packs.name: decision_making
packs.description: Frameworks, biases, and structured approaches to decision-making

packs.name: business_analysis
packs.description: Requirements, stakeholder management, and business process analysis

packs.name: project_management
packs.description: Planning, estimation, risk, and delivery across methodologies

packs.name: fleet_management
packs.description: Vehicle lifecycle, maintenance scheduling, and fleet operations

packs.name: logistics
packs.description: Supply chain, routing, warehousing, and last-mile delivery

packs.name: maintenance
packs.description: Preventive, predictive, and corrective maintenance strategies

packs.name: compliance
packs.description: Regulatory frameworks, audit readiness, and compliance operations

packs.name: investment_decision
packs.description: Capital allocation, ROI analysis, and investment decision frameworks

packs.name: organizational_memory
packs.description: Meeting outcomes, decision records, lessons learned, knowledge governance, and institutional memory — how to build a learning organization

packs.name: learning_certification
packs.description: Learning science, knowledge maps, certification paths, and common mistakes — for students, professionals, and trainers

packs.name: technical_support
packs.description: Issue patterns, root cause analysis, fixes, workarounds, and knowledge extraction from support tickets — for support engineers, SREs, and product teams

packs.name: transport_route_optimization
packs.description: Route planning, vehicle assignment, capacity utilization, and scheduling — from TSP/VRP fundamentals to the operational decisions SMEs still run in Excel

packs.name: property_management
packs.description: Maintenance cycles, tenant relations, lease renewals, energy cost control, and vendor management — turning incident reports into reusable property decisions

packs.name: procurement
packs.description: Supplier evaluation, vendor scoring, tender analysis, contract risk, and award decisions — turning supplier interactions into reusable procurement knowledge

packs.name: proposal_writing
packs.description: Proposal structures, scope definitions, pricing models (Fixed Price vs T&M decision), risk clauses, and project estimations — for consultants, freelancers, agencies, and SMEs

packs.name: healthcare_administration
packs.description: NHS operational workflows, compliance frameworks (CQC, GDPR, MHA, Duty of Candour), scheduling, patient flow, and administrative procedures — not diagnosis, administration

packs.name: sales_engineering
packs.description: Customer requirements gathering, technical objection handling, competitor comparisons, PoC design, and proposal knowledge — turning technical sales interactions into reusable intelligence

packs.name: customer_success
packs.description: SaaS customer success — health scoring, renewal risk, escalation management, feature request pipelines, and the conversion of support tickets into product decisions
